story.text: The keystone acceptance test is a fixture log (two atom versions, a negating receipt on the old, a later advancing receipt on the live, a heal stale-park finding, a derived consequence node, an arc membership, an authored_by edge, and one deliberately-bad mark citation) asserting tier-1 edges only, drag+repair marks created, consequence node only when cited, decaying propagation that does NOT cross actor hubs or arc siblings, ghost citation refused as a gap, deterministic across two runs. If the test cannot refuse the ghost, the fold is not real.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'consequence-graph' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.consequence-graph-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
